name: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')
description: The web application accepts a user-controlled URL parameter and uses it to redirect users to an external site without validation, enabling phishing attacks where victims trust the original domain but land on a malicious page.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a URL or redirect target that flows to an EGRESS[http_redirect] node (Location header, meta refresh, JavaScript redirect) without passing through a CONTROL node that validates the destination against an allowlist of trusted domains
